transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-20]
[00:00] You: Today's code review meeting covers the authentication refactor PR. Speaker 1, walk us through the changes.
[00:30] Speaker 1: Sure. I've moved from JWT stored in localStorage to httpOnly cookies with CSRF protection. The session management is now stateless on the client side.
[01:30] Speaker 2: I like the direction. One concern — the refresh token rotation implementation. Currently if a user has two tabs open and both refresh at the same time, you'll get a race condition.
[02:15] Speaker 1: Good catch. I hadn't tested that scenario. I'll add a lock mechanism to prevent concurrent refresh calls. I'll push that fix today.
[02:50] Speaker 3: On the CSRF side, I'd want to see the token validation tested against malformed tokens and replay attacks. Do you have tests for those?
[03:20] Speaker 1: Not yet. I'll add those test cases by Wednesday, July 22nd.
[03:50] You: The PR also changes the session expiry logic. Speaker 2, can you review that section specifically?
[04:10] Speaker 2: I'll do a focused review of the session expiry code and leave comments by tomorrow, July 21st.
[04:35] You: Good. Once those issues are addressed, let's target merging by July 24th. Speaker 1, flag us when the fixes are ready.
[05:00] Speaker 1: Will do. I'll also update the API documentation to reflect the new cookie-based auth flow. I'll have that done before the merge.

action_items.description: Add lock mechanism to prevent concurrent refresh token race condition
action_items.source_quote: I'll add a lock mechanism to prevent concurrent refresh calls. I'll push that fix today.

action_items.description: Add CSRF token test cases for malformed tokens and replay attacks
action_items.source_quote: I'll add those test cases by Wednesday, July 22nd.

action_items.description: Review session expiry code section and leave comments on PR
action_items.source_quote: I'll do a focused review of the session expiry code and leave comments by tomorrow, July 21st.

action_items.description: Update API documentation to reflect new cookie-based auth flow
action_items.source_quote: I'll also update the API documentation to reflect the new cookie-based auth flow. I'll have that done before the merge.

decisions: Auth refactor moves from JWT in localStorage to httpOnly cookies with CSRF protection
PR merge target is July 24th pending all fixes being addressed
